perf.regime: Fused MHC pre-norm: RMS-prenorm projection split into pre/post/comb heads, sinkhorn mixing, and the pre-weighted residual combine that produces layer_input (the branch the TileLang kernel mislowers on gfx942). Perf unmeasured without a GPU.

notes: Portable Triton (runs on NVIDIA and AMD); a drop-in replacement for the TileLang fusion. The near-twin mhc_post (sinkhorn-mixed residual + gated block update) shares this Op Spec family and could be added as its own op/spec by the same procedure. wave_size not load-bearing at this metadata tier.
